tasks.title: Investigate MIME type error for JavaScript module scripts in Cloudflare deployment
tasks.description: Analyze the Cloudflare deployment configuration and server response headers to identify why JavaScript module scripts are served with MIME type 'application/octet-stream' instead of 'application/javascript'. Check Cloudflare worker or static file settings that affect Content-Type headers for .js files.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause of incorrect MIME type response for module scripts is identified
Relevant configuration files or deployment settings are located for modification
tasks.expectedResult: Clear understanding of why MIME type is incorrect and which configuration or code files need changes

metadata.inputContext: Cloudflare deployment configuration and server response headers
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides root cause analysis for MIME type error to enable targeted fix

tasks.title: Investigate manifest.webmanifest syntax error
tasks.description: Examine the manifest.webmanifest file in the project root or public directory to identify syntax errors at line 1, column 1. Validate JSON syntax and ensure the manifest file conforms to web manifest specifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Syntax errors in manifest.webmanifest are identified
Manifest file location and content are verified
tasks.expectedResult: Exact syntax issues in manifest.webmanifest are documented and file location confirmed

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides root cause analysis for manifest syntax error to enable targeted fix

tasks.title: Fix Cloudflare deployment to serve JavaScript module scripts with correct MIME type
tasks.description: Modify Cloudflare deployment configuration or worker scripts to ensure .js files are served with 'application/javascript' MIME type. If using static file hosting, configure correct Content-Type headers. Test locally or in staging environment to confirm fix.
acceptanceCriteria: JavaScript module scripts are served with MIME type 'application/javascript'
No MIME type errors appear in browser console when loading scripts
tasks.expectedResult: Cloudflare deployment serves JS module scripts with correct MIME type, eliminating related errors

outputPlan.target: cloudflare configuration or worker script files
outputPlan.description: Update deployment config or worker scripts to set correct Content-Type for JS modules

metadata.inputContext: MIME type error root cause and Cloudflare deployment config
targetFiles: cloudflare configuration or worker script files
evidence: No MIME type errors in browser
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Fixes the core deployment issue causing MIME type errors for module scripts

tasks.title: Fix syntax errors in manifest.webmanifest file
tasks.description: Correct the syntax errors in manifest.webmanifest file by fixing JSON formatting issues at line 1, column 1. Validate the manifest file with a JSON validator and web manifest validator to ensure compliance.
acceptanceCriteria: Manifest passes web manifest validation without errors
tasks.expectedResult: manifest.webmanifest file is syntactically correct and valid for browser consumption

outputPlan.description: Fix JSON syntax errors and ensure valid manifest content

metadata.inputContext: Manifest syntax error details and file content
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Fixes manifest syntax to enable proper browser recognition and usage

tasks.title: Test Cloudflare deployment after MIME type and manifest fixes
tasks.description: Deploy the updated Cloudflare configuration and manifest.webmanifest file. Test the application in a browser to confirm that JavaScript module scripts load without MIME type errors and that the manifest file loads without syntax errors. Check browser console for errors.
acceptanceCriteria: No MIME type errors for module scripts in browser console
No manifest syntax errors in browser console
tasks.expectedResult: Deployment serves correct MIME types and valid manifest, confirmed by browser and curl tests

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates that fixes resolved the deployment issues

tasks.title: Add automated self-test script for deployment validation
tasks.description: Create a shell script named scripts/selftest.sh that performs automated checks for MIME type correctness of JavaScript module scripts and manifest syntax validation by fetching relevant URLs and checking headers and content. The script should output pass/fail results for each check.
acceptanceCriteria: Self-test script exists and is executable
Script checks MIME type of JS modules and manifest validity
tasks.expectedResult: Automated self-test script is created and passes when run against deployment

outputPlan.description: Shell script to validate MIME types and manifest correctness in deployment

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides automated validation for deployment correctness
